ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Fetch the link title when pasting a link in the editor with the default paste command
ast.target: 在编辑器中使用默认粘贴命令粘贴链接时获取链接标题

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Fetch the link title when drag and dropping a link from another program
ast.target: 从其他程序拖放链接时获取链接标题

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the maximum length of the title. Set to 0 to disable.
ast.target: 设置标题的最大长度。设置为0可禁用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to prefer selected text as title over fetched title when pasting
ast.target: 粘贴时是否优先使用选定文本作为标题，而不是获取的标题

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: List of strings (comma separated) that disable autocompleting website titles. Can be URLs or arbitrary text.
ast.target: 禁用自动补全网站标题的字符串列表（逗号分隔）。可以是URL或任意文本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use a more readable placeholder when fetching the title of a link.
ast.target: 获取链接标题时使用更易读的占位符。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: API key for the LinkPreview.net service. Get one at https://my.linkpreview.net/access_keys
